author: maxine--plan-050
content: Observation: Three PRs already merged on origin/develop: #294 (CLI restructure, REQ-9), #295 (kickoff agent init/sync, REQ-6), #296 (TUI view state + scroll clamping, REQ-4/REQ-5). These satisfy REQ-4, REQ-5, REQ-6, and REQ-9. Remaining: REQ-1 (knowledge section edits), REQ-2 (kickoff list), REQ-3 (TUI sync), REQ-7 (branch protection), REQ-8 (repo cleanup), REQ-10 (version bump).
